message:
feat(policy): integrate QuarantineRegistry into PolicyEngine authorize pipeline

Wire the quarantine registry as the earliest gate in evaluate_authorization():
- Emergency kill switch check blocks ALL actions immediately
- Pane-level quarantine checks block writes (Restricted+) or all actions (Isolated+)
- Kill switch SoftStop/HardStop blocks writes via registry-level check
- Quarantine denials recorded in the forensic decision log

8 new integration tests covering: initial state, write blocking, read passthrough,
isolated blocking, emergency halt, soft stop, release restore, and decision log recording.
All 328 policy tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
